creator: crum.zach@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 148718
dmesg output from system

In 10.1-RC2 kern.vty=vt in /boot/loader.conf.local enabled the new console. I loved it. 

Upgrading to RC3 lost the functionality.

uname output: FreeBSD Shadow 10.0-RC3-p1 FreeBSD 10.0-RC3-p1 #0: Sat Jan 11 07:51:07 UTC 2014     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
